title: Sudden discomfort in a validation fixture

navigation.case_label: CP-P001-C001 · Sudden discomfort in a validation fixture

stem_nodes.text: You are a doctor in a synthetic test clinic.
An adult presents with sudden discomfort during activity.
This fixture is for validation only, not clinical study.

tasks.text: Explain the urgency and provide a handover.

turns.speaker: you
turns.text: Hello, I am the doctor here. Tell me what happened.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I have this sudden discomfort and it is not settling.

turns.speaker: you
turns.text: What were you doing when it started, and what followed?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: It began during activity, then the warning feature appeared.

turns.speaker: you
turns.text: Please give me the immediate observations and focused finding.

turns.speaker: examiner
turns.text: The synthetic observation and focused finding are abnormal.

turns.speaker: action
turns.text: I am activating the synthetic escalation pathway now.

turns.speaker: you
turns.text: This pattern may be serious, so waiting here is not safe.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I was hoping to stay. Why do I need to transfer?

turns.speaker: you
turns.text: The warning features mean the safer path is urgent assessment elsewhere.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I understand. I will go with the transfer team.

turns.speaker: handover
turns.text: Synthetic handover: sudden onset, warning cluster, abnormal finding, escalation activated.

hints.label: Hint
hints.visible_hint: Does the context explain the whole pattern?

expanded.connect: Context changes probability but does not establish one cause.
expanded.mechanism: The fixture uses context as a risk-changing clue, not a diagnosis.
expanded.clinical_weight: Keep both the plausible and urgent paths open.
expanded.next_thought: Look for the feature that changes the action threshold.

hints.label: Hint
hints.visible_hint: What changed enough to act now?

expanded.observe: The warning feature and abnormal finding are present.
expanded.connect: Together they cross the predefined fixture threshold.
expanded.mechanism: The threshold converts assessment into immediate action.
expanded.clinical_weight: Further proof must not delay the predefined action.
expanded.next_thought: Start the action, then continue focused assessment.

hints.label: Hint
hints.visible_hint: What must the patient understand before moving?

expanded.observe: The patient prefers to remain in the clinic.
expanded.connect: The concern is practical, but the safety boundary remains.
expanded.mechanism: Clear explanation can support cooperation without weakening urgency.
expanded.clinical_weight: Address the concern underneath the resistance.
expanded.next_thought: Explain the risk and what transfer involves.

expanded.observe: The decision threshold has been crossed.
expanded.connect: The next task is no longer more data collection.
expanded.mechanism: The fixture decision point links the warning cluster to immediate escalation.
expanded.clinical_weight: Action begins now while focused assessment continues in parallel.
expanded.next_thought: State and start the immediate action.

segments.label: Setting
segments.focus: Who are you, where are you, and what can happen here?

segments.label: Tasks
segments.focus: Turn each task into one visible destination.

segments.label: Safety map
segments.focus: Keep the urgent path open before entering.

segments.label: Explain
segments.move_on_signal: The explanation and handover are complete.
